summary: Phase 4A (/calls page) end-to-end UI testing — all acceptance criteria pass. Login → impersonation (via localStorage) → calls list with 11 rows, filters, search, detail Sheet with Résumé IA + TranscriptView (assistant/caller/transfer bubbles), and 'Voir fiche contact' redirection all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Vite HMR WebSocket fails (wss://localhost) — purely dev-env noise, not user-impacting. Unrelated to Phase 4A.
Calls.jsx is 414 lines — still healthy. CallDetailSheet is defined inline; could be extracted to /components/calls/CallDetailSheet.jsx once it grows beyond current scope (Phase 8 audio playback etc).
intent Badge inside the detail Sheet header has no data-testid (only the table-row intent badge has `intent-<value>`). Minor: consider adding for symmetry.
Frontend uses VITE_API_URL (Vite) — confirmed working; this is a Vite app, not CRA, so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL constraint from system prompt is N/A here.
test_credentials: contact@exevori.com / Exevori_Test_2026! (super_admin). Impersonated company: Garage Tremblay (af5f079f-6fc2-4d70-8c8d-51d83d301906) via localStorage key 'voicedesk_impersonate_company'.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed-phase4-mock.js data (7 mocks + 4 pre-existing = 11 calls).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calls page is at /calls. Login + localStorage impersonation pattern works reliably to reach Garage Tremblay data without using the UI ImpersonationSwitcher. Key data-testids: calls-page, calls-title, calls-table, calls-filterbar, intent-<key>, call-status-<status>, confidence-pill, call-detail-sheet, call-detail-name, call-section-summary, call-section-transcript, transcript-list, turn-assistant, turn-caller, turn-transfer, call-action-open-contact, call-action-callback.
